title: Multiple board styles defaults to select from
excerpt:

posts.author: reem.s (Reem Shapira)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Different boards conatins different needs, and there is only one place to set board defaults in an account, which limit our abilities to work fast, because for each subitem or new board - you have to create different statuses from scrach.

When creating a new status column, we would appriciate an option to load different sets of pre-made statuses, we already created.

Thanks

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Reem,

Thanks for your request

Can you let me know if our column templates feature is along the lines of what you’re looking for? This feature is exclusive to our Enterprise plan at this time.

Let me know!
